title: ricinocarpus angatensis
intro: Ricinocarpus angatensis, also known as the Angatana plant, is a shrub native to the Northern Territory in Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly the leaves and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus angatensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
